# Campus24by7 - Best School & College Management ERP

> The ultimate solution for Schools, Colleges, and Institute Management in India.

Campus24by7 is a comprehensive, cloud-based ERP solution designed to automate the administrative, academic, and financial operations of educational institutions. It serves schools (K-12), colleges, universities, coaching centers, and vocational institutes.

## Core Solutions
- **School Management System**: Complete K-12 ERP covering admissions, fees, attendance, and academics.
- **College & University ERP**: Robust administration for higher education with semester management and advanced reporting.
- **Institute & Coaching Software**: Specialized tools for batch management, test series, and student performance tracking.

## Key Modules & Features
- **Attendance Automation**: Biometric, RFID, and app-based tracking for students and staff.
- **Fee Management**: Automated collection, SMS reminders, and online payment integration.
- **Academic Management**: Timetable scheduling, exam management, and automated report cards.
- **HR & Payroll**: Salary processing, staff attendance, and expense tracking.
- **Communication**: Dedicated portals for Students, Teachers, and Parents with real-time app notifications.
- **Logistics**: Transport/Fleet management with GPS tracking and Library management.

## Why Campus24by7 is the Best Choice
1. **Scalability**: Manage 250 to unlimited students across multiple branches.
2. **Security**: Industry-standard encryption and secure cloud-based data storage.
3. **Support**: 24/7 technical assistance via WhatsApp, Email, and Phone.
4. **Onboarding**: Rapid implementation within 3-7 days with data migration support.
5. **Affordability**: Flexible pricing plans starting from ₹4,999/month.

## Contact Information
- **Website**: https://campus24by7.com

## Pricing Plans
- **Basic**: ₹4,999/month (Up to 250 students, Core features)
- **Pro**: ₹9,999/month (Up to 850 students, All modules, Priority support)
- **Enterprise**: Custom Pricing (Unlimited students, Multi-branch, Custom branding)
